column11:
Your steps to use the table correctly:

1. Make sure to log into your Google account.  
2. Click on the "Copy Table" cell once, then follow the link.  
3. Confirm copying the table to your Google Drive.  
4. Use it and enjoy!  

Attention! Do not modify any locked formulas or formats.  
Doing so may cause the entire table to function incorrectly.

Created: by Kollans. For Slime Castle players.
